/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/embed_chat.dir/examples/embed_chat.c.o -o embed_chat  -lm
